name: Altavista YMCA
description: Altavista YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Altavista, VA. There are 5 hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Hyland Heights Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Hyland Heights Baptist Church in Rustburg, VA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
